The final move in this position is **\boxed{g2f1}** (castling kingside).

The game ends in a draw (1/2-1/2), and the last move is a standard kingside castling by White, which is a logical move to secure the king and prepare for potential endgame play. The repetition of moves (d4-d8, e4-g2) leading to the draw suggests this was a deliberate move to enforce the threefold repetition rule.
